degraded.reason: Docs + metadata-only iterate (README.md, docs/guide.md, .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, scripts/install.sh); no Python source changed, so the unit/integration/e2e suites are not applicable. Verified instead via sync_check (6/6 OK), path-canon lints (test_artifact_path_canon.py + test_path_canon_windows.py, 14 passed / 1 skipped), and the F0 leak-guard (ALLOW, isolated).
Pre-existing sweep-outbox warning from setup_iterate_worktree (trg-671bb0a2 status append dropped by a prior merge) — unrelated to this change; not introduced or resolvable here.

surface_verification.justification: Documentation (README + guide §2.9/§2.10) and plugin-catalog metadata (marketplace.json) plus an advisory Node-version threshold in install.sh. No web/CLI end-user app surface and no executable code path changed; verification is the metadata + content gates (sync_check, path-canon) rather than a runnable surface.

behaviors.reason: Advisory echo branch executes only during an interactive install on a host with Node < 20; no unit harness exercises it — verified by inspection of the edited branch.

behaviors.reason: Anchors computed via the GitHub heading-slug algorithm (§2.1/§2.4/§2.6/§2.9/§2.10/§3/§3.5/§12); the repo has no automated Markdown link checker — links degrade to file-top if imperfect.
